KeysToEntries.NarrativeIntroTextPart1: Dragons, always trouble, and Ashenfall has more than its share.
KeysToEntries.NarrativeIntroTextPart2: When the continent was suddenly discovered, explorers poured in to claim its secrets.
KeysToEntries.NarrativeIntroTextPart3: The dragons didn't like that, not one little bit.
KeysToEntries.NarrativeIntroTextPart4: So we called the best - yes, that's you - to hunt them down and end their threat.
KeysToEntries.NarrativeIntroTextPart5: Get ready, hero! We're all counting on you.
